note: Contract burdens extracted from Items 5-17 summary provisions and Exhibit B cross-references. Full Exhibit B clause walk deferred (82 pages) — key operative burdens captured below.

burdens.obligation: 10-year initial term from opening date; one 10-year successor franchise on then-current terms (may be materially different)
Must secure acceptable site within 12 months of signing FA; franchisor must approve site, lease, and general contractor
Must build to franchisor specifications; franchisor must approve all plans/specs; franchisor may designate general contractor; must open within 16 months of FA effective date

Operations Partner must complete 3-week training + 4-week apprenticeship before opening; if cannot complete to satisfaction, FA may be terminated (half of franchise fee kept). All certified managers must pass proficiency tests. Re-certification required if inactive 6+ months.
10 certified-manager shifts/week (14/week for first 12 months of first restaurant). Operations Partner: 5 half-shifts/week (first restaurant).
Required for 3rd+ restaurant; 1 DM per 3-5 restaurants; cannot manage >5; must complete all certified manager training plus DM training program
6% royalty + 4.5% ad fund + 0.5% local marketing + up to 2% cooperative = up to 13% of Gross Sales, auto-debited weekly via EDTA
burdens.consequence: interest at 1.5%/month; late fee 10%; if not reported, 120% of prior week debited

burdens.obligation: Must buy Trade Secret Food Products and Branded Products exclusively from designated sources. Equipment and POS from designated suppliers. Insurance from A.M. Best A-VII rated insurer.
No ownership or services in competitive business anywhere
burdens.definition: Competitive = >50% non-beverage revenue from submarine/hero/deli/wrapped sandwiches

burdens.obligation: 2 years post-expiration/termination
burdens.scope: At premises; within 3 miles of premises; within 3 miles of any JJ restaurant existing at signing; within 1 mile of any JJ restaurant existing at termination

burdens.obligation: No transfer without prior written consent. DRA development rights not assignable. ROFR: franchisor may match any offer.
burdens.conditions: Transferee must qualify, train, sign current FA, upgrade/remodel, pay transfer fee ($2,500-$12,500), sign release, no defaults in 60-day lookback

burdens.obligation: 13 non-curable defaults: failure to secure site (12 mo), failure to open (16 mo), opening before approval, training failure, abandonment, loss of premises, unapproved transfers, material misrepresentation, felony, dishonest conduct, unauthorized disclosure, repeated defaults (even if cured), cross-default with other JJ agreements
Up to 36 months (or remaining term, whichever shorter) × average monthly royalty for 12 months preceding termination
burdens.trigger: franchisor terminates with cause or franchisee terminates without cause
burdens.due: within 15 days of termination effective date

burdens.obligation: Pay outstanding amounts, complete de-identification, assign phone numbers, return confidential information
Must reimburse franchisor and affiliates for claims from restaurant operation or costs to defend
Owners must sign Principal's Agreement (Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations) — all FA provisions apply to owners
burdens.scope: personal liability for all FA obligations

burdens.obligation: Property (100% replacement), business interruption (covers royalty), GL + umbrella, auto, workers' comp, EPLI, MVR affidavit. Franchisor/affiliates as additional insureds (CG2029). Primary and non-contributory. Minimum A.M. Best A-VII.
Must sign EDTA authorization before opening. Franchisor may auto-debit all fees, purchases, and amounts owed. May debit before due date if payment appears at risk.
Under Multi-Brand Addendum, termination or expiration of Other Franchise Agreement triggers termination of JJ FA
burdens.trigger: termination/expiration of Other Restaurant's franchise agreement

burdens.obligation: Litigation only in courts closest to franchisor's principal business address (currently Atlanta, GA); Georgia law governs
burdens.exceptions: MD, MN, ND state riders override forum and governing law

burdens.obligation: 9 months to assign to approved party; franchisor may manage at $600/person/day + expenses
Must sign Option to Assume Lease (Exhibit B-5) with landlord when signing lease — gives franchisor right to Restaurant's site if franchise terminates/not renewed or franchisee loses possession

distinctive_clauses: Securitization SPV structure — franchisor is a special purpose vehicle that delegates all operations to affiliate JJF
120% auto-debit: if Gross Sales not reported on time, franchisor debits 120% of prior week's royalty and fund contribution
Expelled trainee wait period: must wait 6 months before re-applying; re-attendance costs $2,000
Non-Traditional College/University Incentive: existing franchisee gets royalty reduction on nearby restaurant when opening campus location
Pioneer Incentive: $50,000 royalty credit per restaurant for first developer of 5+ restaurants in AK, HI, ME, NH, RI, VT
